assembly.name: 4Axis_RobotArm_Assembly
assembly.summary: 一个包含底座和3节机械臂连杆的4轴机械臂装配体。底座提供水平旋转（Yaw），各臂之间提供竖直旋转（Pitch）。连杆主体为φ60圆柱，两端带80x80x25方块并倒角C5。连接方式采用轴孔配合：底座顶部φ40轴插入Link1底部φ42孔；Link1/2顶部侧面伸出φ30销轴，插入下一节臂底部侧面φ32孔，预留间隙防干涉。Link3末端集成固定式平行夹爪。
design_rules: Units: mm in description, convert to meters for modeling code.
Clearance: Shaft-hole fit has 1mm radial clearance (2mm diameter difference).
Spacing: Adjacent arm end faces have 2mm gap.
Chamfer: C5 chamfer on block edges.

parts.name: Base Plate
parts.function: Provides stable foundation and Yaw rotation axis.
parts.shape: Rectangular prism 200x200x100mm with a central cylindrical boss φ40x30mm on top face.
parts.material_or_notes: Steel or Aluminum. Boss is integral part of base.

axes.name: base_top_axis
axes.purpose: Yaw rotation axis, concentric with Link1 bottom hole

assembly_relation_notes: Top face mates with Link1 bottom face.
Top axis mates with Link1 bottom hole axis.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane centered at origin.
Draw rectangle 200x200mm.
Extrude up 100mm.
On top face, create sketch circle φ40mm centered.
Extrude up 30mm to form boss.

parts.name: Link 1
parts.function: First arm segment, connects Base to Link 2 via Pitch joint.
parts.shape: Central cylinder φ60x300mm. Bottom end has 80x80x25mm block with φ42mm through hole. Top end has 80x80x25mm block with φ30mm side pin extending along X.
parts.material_or_notes: Aluminum. Chamfer C5 on block edges.

axes.name: link1_top_pin_axis
axes.purpose: Pitch rotation axis, concentric with Link2 bottom side hole

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis concentric with Base top axis.
Bottom face coincident with Base top face.
Top pin axis concentric with Link2 bottom side hole axis.
Top pin base face offset 2mm from Link2 bottom side face.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane, draw circle φ60mm, extrude 300mm along Z.
At bottom (Z=0), create sketch on XY plane, draw square 80x80mm centered, extrude down 25mm.
Cut hole φ42mm through the bottom block along Z.
Apply C5 chamfer to bottom block edges.
At top (Z=300), create sketch on XY plane, draw square 80x80mm centered, extrude up 25mm.
On the +X side face of the top block, create sketch circle φ30mm centered vertically.
Extrude out 20mm along +X to form pin.
Apply C5 chamfer to top block edges.

parts.name: Link 2
parts.function: Second arm segment, connects Link 1 to Link 3 via Pitch joint.
parts.shape: Central cylinder φ60x250mm. Bottom end has 80x80x25mm block with φ32mm side hole. Top end has 80x80x25mm block with φ30mm side pin extending along X.
parts.material_or_notes: Aluminum. Chamfer C5 on block edges.

faces.name: link2_bottom_side_face_hole
faces.purpose: Mates with Link1 top pin base face (with gap)

axes.name: link2_bottom_side_hole_axis
axes.purpose: Concentric with Link1 top pin axis

axes.name: link2_top_pin_axis
axes.purpose: Pitch rotation axis, concentric with Link3 bottom side hole

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom side hole axis concentric with Link1 top pin axis.
Bottom side face offset 2mm from Link1 top pin base face.
Top pin axis concentric with Link3 bottom side hole axis.
Top pin base face offset 2mm from Link3 bottom side face.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane, draw circle φ60mm, extrude 250mm along Z.
At bottom (Z=0), create sketch on XY plane, draw square 80x80mm centered, extrude down 25mm.
On the -X side face of the bottom block, create sketch circle φ32mm centered vertically.
Cut hole through the block along X.
Apply C5 chamfer to bottom block edges.
At top (Z=250), create sketch on XY plane, draw square 80x80mm centered, extrude up 25mm.
On the +X side face of the top block, create sketch circle φ30mm centered vertically.
Extrude out 20mm along +X to form pin.
Apply C5 chamfer to top block edges.

parts.name: Link 3 with Gripper
parts.function: Third arm segment with integrated fixed parallel gripper.
parts.shape: Central cylinder φ60x200mm. Bottom end has 80x80x25mm block with φ32mm side hole. Top end integrates a fixed parallel gripper structure.
parts.material_or_notes: Aluminum. Chamfer C5 on block edges. Gripper is static geometry.

faces.name: link3_bottom_side_face_hole
faces.purpose: Mates with Link2 top pin base face (with gap)

axes.name: link3_bottom_side_hole_axis
axes.purpose: Concentric with Link2 top pin axis

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom side hole axis concentric with Link2 top pin axis.
Bottom side face offset 2mm from Link2 top pin base face.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane, draw circle φ60mm, extrude 200mm along Z.
At bottom (Z=0), create sketch on XY plane, draw square 80x80mm centered, extrude down 25mm.
On the -X side face of the bottom block, create sketch circle φ32mm centered vertically.
Cut hole through the block along X.
Apply C5 chamfer to bottom block edges.
At top (Z=200), model fixed parallel gripper: Create two rectangular jaws extending from the top face, symmetric about Z axis.

assembly_sequence: Insert base_plate and fix to GROUND.
Mate link_2.bottom_side_face_hole to link_1.top_side_face_pin_base with 2mm offset (distance).
Mate link_3.bottom_side_face_hole to link_2.top_side_face_pin_base with 2mm offset (distance).
